rationale: The citing paper uses Soberman (2003) only in grouped citations: once as part of a broad stream on seller-consumer cooperation and once as one of several precedents for specifying expected consumer inconvenience cost. It does not discuss or build on Soberman's specific simultaneous signaling-screening warranty mechanism, nor does it compare results against that paper. The reference serves as general background support rather than a distinct, paper-specific input to the article's core contribution.
